content: {"file": "node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/index.js", "summary": "This file contains the core components of RxJS, including various types of observables and subjects, as well as utility functions for working with them. It includes classes like Observable, Subject, BehaviorSubject, ReplaySubject, AsyncSubject, Action, AsyncAction, and others that are essential for building reactive applications.", "rules": [{"name": "Observable", "description": "Represents a push-based observable stream of data.", "conditions": ["extends EventEmitter"], "actions": ["emit events"]}, {"name": "Subject", "description": "A Subject is an Observable that allows values to be multicasted to many Observers.", "conditions": ["extends Observable"], "actions": ["next(value)", "error(err)", "complete()"]}], "dependencies": ["EventEmitter"]}
